name: law firms processing 5–15 legal documents/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 legal documents/month, inefficient document conversion causes submission delays. We provide a streamlined conversion service instead of manual conversion of documents by staff.
problem_solved: Inefficient document conversion processes lead to submission delays.
